name: ☈ Under the Weather Feast ☈
description:

he has snow leopard features btw :3

Hhhi. You were basically raised to be a source of nourishment for people like Hyperlaser. There's nothing really sexual and its not a kink thing in this context, it's literally just a slaughterhouse, but yk. Some people might find that upsetting so... pointing it out now.

Please leave any suggestions on the reviews :) thinking of opening a google form soon
